zh.lifeSummary: 當William Trussebut於大約1121年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾瓦特時，他的父親William de Trussebut33歲，母親Rohese FitzPayn23歲。他與Albreda de Harcourt在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾爾姆斯利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1176年在英國英格蘭越可爾英格曼東普享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Trussebut was born about 1121, in Warter, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Trussebut, was 33 and his mother, Rohese FitzPayn, was 23. He married Albreda de Harcourt in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1176, in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England: Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Trussebut est né environ 1121, à Warter, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Trussebut, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Rohese FitzPayn, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Albreda de Harcourt à Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1176, à Ingmanthorpe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Trussebut um 1121 in Warter, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Trussebut 33 und seine Mutter Rohese FitzPayn 23. Er hat in Helmsley, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Albreda de Harcourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1176 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Albreda de Harcourt nel Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Trussebutが約1121年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワーターで生まれた時，父William de Trussebutは33歳，母Rohese FitzPaynは23歳であった。イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーでAlbreda de Harcourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1176年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアイングマンソルペで57歳で死去した。

ko.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 워터
ko.lifeSummary: William Trussebut(이)가 대략 1121년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 워터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Trussebut(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese FitzPayn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 Albreda de Harcourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 잉먼소에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Trussebut nasceu aproximadamente 1121, em Warter, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Trussebut, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Rohese FitzPayn, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Albreda de Harcourt em Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1176, em Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.Warter, Yorkshire East Riding, England: вартир, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Trussebut родился около 1121 г. в местности вартир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Trussebut было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese FitzPayn, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Albreda de Harcourt в местности хелмсли, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1176 г. в местности ингмантаурп, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

Se casó con Albreda de Harcourt en Helmsley, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1176, en Ingmanthorpe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
